items.text:
University Recreation Center — Group Fitness Class Schedule (Spring Semester)

Effective January 15 through May 10. All classes are held in the Fitness Studio (Room 102) unless otherwise noted.

Monday:
7:00 AM – Yoga (45 min)
12:00 PM – Spin (45 min)
5:30 PM – Zumba (60 min)

Tuesday:
6:30 AM – Pilates (45 min)
12:00 PM – HIIT (30 min)
6:00 PM – Strength Training (60 min)

Wednesday:
7:00 AM – Yoga (45 min)
12:00 PM – Spin (45 min)
5:30 PM – Zumba (60 min)

Thursday:
6:30 AM – Pilates (45 min)
12:00 PM – HIIT (30 min)
6:00 PM – Strength Training (60 min)

Friday:
7:00 AM – Yoga (45 min)
12:00 PM – Spin (45 min)

Saturday:
9:00 AM – Boot Camp (60 min) – Outdoor Field (Weather Permitting)

Policies:
- A $5 late cancellation fee applies if you cancel less than 2 hours before class.
- Arrive at least 5 minutes early to sign in. Late arrivals may not be admitted.
- Bring a towel and water bottle. Mats are provided.
- Class schedules may change during holidays or exam weeks.

format_metadata.subject: Group Fitness Class Schedule Spring Semester

questions.stem: According to the schedule, what is the fee for canceling a class reservation within two hours of its start time?

options.A: A $5 late cancellation fee is charged.

questions.explanation: The policies section states: 'A $5 late cancellation fee applies if you cancel less than 2 hours before class.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the Saturday Boot Camp class?

options.A: It may be canceled if the weather is bad.
options.B: It requires participants to bring their own mats.
options.C: It is held in the Fitness Studio like other classes.
options.D: It does not have a late cancellation fee.

questions.explanation: The schedule notes 'Outdoor Field (Weather Permitting)' for Saturday Boot Camp, implying it could be canceled due to inclement weather.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this schedule?

options.A: To list the times and locations of all recreation center activities.
options.B: To announce a new spring semester class schedule.
options.C: To describe the policies for attending fitness classes.
options.D: To inform students about group fitness class offerings and rules.

questions.explanation: The schedule provides the class times, locations, and associated policies for the spring semester, making D the most comprehensive summary.

items.text:
Subject: Your bookstore order is ready for pickup

Dear Maria,

Your textbook order (Order #BX-78432) is now available for pickup at the Campus Bookstore in the Student Union Building. Your order includes:
- Biology 101: Concepts and Connections (3rd Edition) — $85.00
- Lab Manual for Biology 101 — $25.00
- Chemistry 101: Principles and Reactions (2nd Edition) — $110.00

Pickup hours are Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and Saturday, 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. The bookstore is closed on Sundays. Please bring your student ID and the order confirmation email. If someone else will pick up your order, they must bring a signed note from you along with their ID.

Orders not picked up within 10 business days will be returned to inventory and you'll receive a refund, minus a $5 restocking fee.

If you have any questions, reply to this email or call us at 555-0192.

Best regards,
Campus Bookstore

format_metadata.subject: Your bookstore order is ready for pickup

questions.stem: According to the email, what must a person who picks up Maria's order bring?

options.A: A $5 restocking fee and a student ID.
options.B: A signed note from Maria and their own ID.
options.C: The order confirmation email and a credit card.
options.D: A photo of Maria and the order number.

questions.explanation: The email states: 'If someone else will pick up your order, they must bring a signed note from you along with their ID.'

questions.stem: What will happen if the order is not picked up within 10 business days?

options.A: The order will be canceled without a refund.
options.B: The books will be put on sale for a lower price.
options.C: The order will be returned to inventory with a $5 restocking fee.
options.D: The bookstore will charge an additional $10 late fee.

questions.explanation: The email says: 'Orders not picked up within 10 business days will be returned to inventory and you'll receive a refund, minus a $5 restocking fee.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the Campus Bookstore's hours?

options.A: It is open every day of the week.
options.C: It has extended hours during exam week.
options.D: It opens at 10:00 AM on weekdays.

questions.explanation: The email states: 'Pickup hours are Monday through Friday... and Saturday... The bookstore is closed on Sundays.'

rejected.reason: answer_position: all 3 answers are "B" — must vary
answer_position: all 3 answers are "C" — must vary
